calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-01-2011 Advanced From Apr-27-11 To Apr-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for and with Joanie Neal (Trustee). Thomas Neal in Propria Persona.

Mr. Neal expressed concern about his Brother's (Joseph) well being, the level of care he is receiving, the actions taken by other Family members, his Brother's bills not being paid, his Brother's medical condition and making sure his Brother is protected. Mr. Neal also requested that the Court remove Joanie as Trustee and order her to take a drug test. The Court spoke of Mr. Neal filing a petition for Conservatorship of his Brother in Madera County, stated that there is no basis to remove Joanie Neal as Trustee and that it did not have authority to order Joanie to take a drug test. Mr. Shustoff offered do a full acccounting and stated that he has the jewlery claimed by Mr. Neal (ring, watch). The Court denied the Petition to Remove Trustee based on the evidence before the Court today. Mr. shustoff is to prepare an order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Ex Parte Petition To Request Earlier Hearing Date For Petition To Remove Jon Neal As Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Ex Parte Petition To Request Earlier Hearing Date For Petition To Remove Joni Neal As Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Denied
